zh.SKIPTON, YORKSHIRE, ENGLAND: 英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓
zh.Skipton, Craven, North Yorkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾斯吉普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Lambert於1128年出生在英國越可爾斯吉普頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton43歲，母親Maud Deross40歲。他與Alice Maundeville在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1197年在英國享年70歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Lambert于1128年出生在英国越可爾斯吉普頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton43岁，母亲Maud Deross40岁。他与Alice Maundeville在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1197年在英国享年70岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Lambert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, and Slovak: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In England, the native Old English form Landbeorht was replaced by Lambert, the Continental form of the name that was taken to England by the Normans from France. The name gained wider currency in Britain in the Middle Ages with the immigration of weavers from Flanders, among whom Saint Lambert or Lamprecht, bishop of Maastricht in around 700, was a popular cult figure. In Italy the name was popularized in the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Lambert I and II, Dukes of Spoleto and Holy Roman Emperors. Lambert is the second most frequent surname in Wallonia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Slovenian Lampret and Lampreht (see also Lampert ).

History: Aubin Lambert dit Champagne from Tourouvre in Orne, France, married Élisabeth Aubert in Quebec City, QC, in 1670; see also Champagne . Eustache Lambert from Boulogne-sur-Mer in Pas-de-Calais, France, married Marie Laurence in France c. 1656, died in Quebec City, QC, in 1673. Pierre Lambert from Fourmetot in Eure, France, married Marie Normand in Quebec City, QC, in 1680. Augustin Hébert dit Lambert, a descendant of Augustin Hébert from Paris, France, married Françoise Petit in Varennes, QC, in 1761. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Lambers
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from the personal name   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lamberth
meanings: English: variant of   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lambertus
meanings: German and Dutch: humanistic name, Latinized form of the personal name   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lamberti
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Gaetano, Luciano, Amedeo, Angelo, Biagio, Domenic, Donato, Enrico, Gino, Iolanda.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Lamberto, an equivalent of Lambert . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.
German and Dutch: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name   Lambert  , using the genitive of its Latinized form   Lambertus  .

variants.name: Lamberty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ana, Dimas, Jose, Juan, Altagracia, Angel, Blanca, Efrain, Fernando, Jaime, Ramon.
German and French: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name Lambert , from Lamberti, the genitive of its Latinized form Lambertus . Compare Lamberti 2.

variants.name: Lambertz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Erna, Johann, Ralf.
North German: patronymic from   Lambert  .

variants.name: Lamberto
meanings: Italian and Spanish: from the personal name Lamberto (see Lambert ).

variants.name: Lampert
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, and Slovak; Hungarian (Lampért): variant of Lambert . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed some cognates from other languages, for example Slovenian Lampret and Lampreht.
English: variant of Lambard, an occupational name from Middle English lambherd, lambhird, lambhurd ‘lamb-herd’ (Old English lamb + hierde).

variants.name: Lambertsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik.
Dutch, Danish, North German, and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name   Lambert  . This surname has died out in the Netherlands.
History: Cornelius Lambertsen came from Utrecht, the Netherlands, arriving at New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY) in 1642.

variants.name: Lamb
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Lamb, a pet form of Lambert .
English: nickname for a meek and inoffensive person, from Middle English lamb, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper of lambs. See also Lamm .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luain ‘descendant of the warrior’, formerly Anglicized as O'Loan (see Lane 3). MacLysaght comments: "The form Lamb(e), which results from a more than usually absurd pseudo-translation (uan ‘lamb’), is now much more numerous than O'Loan itself.".

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Lambert was born in 1128, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton, was 43 and his mother, Maud Deross, was 40. He married Alice Maundeville in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1197, in England, at the age of 70, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Lambert est né en 1128, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Maud Deross, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Alice Maundeville à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1197, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Lambert 1128 in Skipton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton 43 und seine Mutter Maud Deross 40. Er hat in Essex, England, United Kingdom Alice Maundeville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1197 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Lambert è nato il nel 1128 nel Skipton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Maud Deross, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Alice Maundeville nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1197, nel England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Lambertが1128年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skiptonは43歳，母Maud Derossは40歳であった。イギリスイギリスエセックスでAlice Maundevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1197年にイギリスで70歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Lambert(이)가 1128년 영국 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Deross(은)는 40세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Alice Maundeville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1197년 영국에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Lambert nasceu em 1128, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Maud Deross, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Maundeville em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1197, em Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Lambert родился в 1128 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Deross, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Maundeville в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1197 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Lambert nació en 1128, en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh FitzLambert Lord of Skipton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Maud Deross, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Alice Maundeville en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1197, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
